held_out_queries: Does CR run special issues / use guest editors, and can I suggest reviewers?
Abstract requirements (cap, structured?); I posted a preprint with a DOI — allowed, and what must I provide?
Review process: screen before peer review? how many reviews back a revise/accept? who decides?
Do supplementary files count toward the 45-page limit?

edits.summary: Add no-special-issues/no-guest-editors, journal-assigns-reviewers (no author recommendations), the 150-word unstructured abstract spec, the preprint prior-posting rule (DOI at submission), the full review chain (initial screen -> two reviews -> Co-editors decide), and supplements-excluded-from-the-45-page-limit. Corrected an over-assertion: replaced named Editors-in-Chief (absent from source map) with Co-editors + live-check masthead.
edits.gate_reason: strict improvement 67 -> 100; also removed a fixed-editor over-assertion per the source map's live-check rule

result: commres-submission held-out 67 -> 100 (+33). Note: templates/checklist.md abstract line still carries the old phrasing (flagged for a later consistency pass).
